title: RXASSIST - 211info
text: PATIENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM CENTER RXASSIST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers information about medication assistance programs, which are set up by pharmaceutical companies to provide free or discounted prescriptions to uninsured individuals who cannot afford their medications. These programs mainly cover brand-name prescriptions. Some assistance programs also extend help to insured individuals who meet specific hardship criteria or whose medications are not covered by their insurance. Additionally, the website provides a printable prescription discount card for users. Website Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information on how to apply for different patient assistance programs. Search patient assistance database by drug, brand, or company name. Some programs offer online applications. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Prescription Drug Discount Cards Prescription Drug Patient Assistance Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
